name: Chicken Noodle Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's NEW Cream of Chicken & Broccoli Soup (10 3/4 oz)
3 cups Cooked medium egg noodles (about 3 cups dry)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine the soup, milk, cheese, and pepper.
2. Add the noodles and chicken to the saucepan.
3. Heat over low heat, stirring occasionally until heated through.
4. Garnish with parsley if desired.
NOTE: If desired, substitute 2 cans (5 oz EACH) Swanson Premium Chunk White Chicken, drained.
Serving suggestion: With green beans and cherry tomatoes.
